title: Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary
tagline: Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Sikkim

overview.short: The Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary or Barsey Rhododendron Sanctuary occupies 104 km2 in the Singalila Range in western Sikkim.
overview.description: The Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary or Barsey Rhododendron Sanctuary occupies 104 km2 in the Singalila Range in western Sikkim. It borders on Nepal to the west, and the state of West Bengal to the south across the Rambong Khola stream. The rhododendrons bloom from March till May.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pelling
topPlaces.description: Pelling (པད་གླིང་། ) is a hill station in ( རྒྱལ་ཤིང་རྫོང་།) Gyalshing district of Sikkim, India. Pelling is nestled at an altitude of 2,150 m (7,050 ft).

topPlaces.name: Daramdin
topPlaces.description: Daramdin is a village located, near Soreng city in Soreng district, Sikkim, India. Daramdin is located, near Soreng, Dentam, Kaluk and Gyalshing.

topPlaces.name: Okhrey
topPlaces.description: Okhrey is a village situated in West Sikkim district, India.

topPlaces.name: Ambotey
topPlaces.description: Ambotey is a village between Daramdin and Sombaria in Soreng district, Sikkim, India. Several schools are located in or near Ambotey.

topPlaces.name: Singshore Bridge, Pelling
topPlaces.description: Singshore Bridge is a suspension bridge located in Pelling, Sikkim, India.

topPlaces.name: Uttarey
topPlaces.description: Uttarey is a mountain village located in the Gyalshing subdivision of Gyalshing district (formerly West Sikkim) in the Indian state of Sikkim. It lies close to the border with eastern Nepal and forms a northern gateway to the Singalila Ridge and several high‑altitude trekking routes.

topPlaces.name: Rimbick
topPlaces.description: Rimbick is a village in the Darjeeling Pulbazar CD block in the Darjeeling Sadar subdivision of the Darjeeling district in West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Singling, Sikkim
topPlaces.description: Singling (height: 6850 ft.) is a community in Sikkim, India. It has been on the trade routes between India and Bhutan since ancient times.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pakyong Airport, Gangtok (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Siliguri Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varsey Rhododendron Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pelling, Daramdin, Okhrey, Ambotey, Singshore Bridge, Pelling.
